verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once, I thought I could get back By myself all alone Saving God for a rainy day But the load of the cares Was too much on my life So, I cried, "God, please come And take them away

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And as a child, I thought that my Father was wrong And I went indeed what I thought was right But at the end, there was my Father Saying, "Child, come on home." And I knew that I needed Him in my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, more then ever, Lord I need You And whatever You ask I will do And I know that I know That Your love is true More then ever, Lord, I need You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The bible says in these last days Perilous times shall come And the devil will do all that he can do And when it gets worse I just call on my Lord Crying, "God, more then ever I need You!"
